caption: Step 1: Open TinkerCAD - Autodesk's free platform for 3D learning and design
description: Open TinkerCAD - Autodesk's free platform for 3D learning and design
narration: We start on TinkerCAD, where the barrier to entry is low and the curiosity payoff is high.
fallback_narration: We open TinkerCAD and set the stage.

caption: Step 2: Open the Learning Center where beginner tutorials are available without login
description: Open the Learning Center where beginner tutorials are available without login
narration: Then we jump straight into the Learning Center, because the fastest way into a tool is usually through a guided win.
fallback_narration: Straight to the Learning Center. No login detour.

caption: Step 3: Search for beginner 3D design tutorials using the search bar
description: Search for beginner 3D design tutorials using the search bar
narration: A quick search pulls the beginner path into focus, which is better than wandering through every lesson card.
fallback_narration: A quick search gets the beginner path on screen.

caption: Step 4: Return to 3D Design tutorials for CAD-focused practice
description: Return to 3D Design tutorials for CAD-focused practice
narration: We peek at another category, then come back to 3D Design so the story stays grounded in CAD.
fallback_narration: Back to 3D Design so the focus stays on CAD.

caption: Step 5: Open a tutorial card to view guided learning content
description: Open a tutorial card to view guided learning content
narration: Open one tutorial card and the platform stops feeling like a homepage and starts feeling like a classroom.
fallback_narration: Open one tutorial and see the guided path.

caption: Step 6: Scroll through the tutorial page to view lesson details and visuals
description: Scroll through the tutorial page to view lesson details and visuals
narration: A quick scroll through the lesson shows the pace, the visuals, and the kind of guidance a beginner will actually get.
fallback_narration: Scroll the lesson and get a feel for the walkthrough.

caption: Step 7: Open the TinkerCAD gallery to explore community designs
description: Open the TinkerCAD gallery to explore community designs
narration: Then we switch gears and head to the gallery, because learning gets easier when inspiration is visible.
fallback_narration: Now we jump to the gallery for inspiration.

caption: Step 8: Browse featured gallery designs for project inspiration
description: Browse featured gallery designs for project inspiration
narration: This is the fun part. The gallery turns abstract learning into real project ideas you might actually want to build.
fallback_narration: The gallery is where ideas start showing up fast.

caption: Step 9: Open a gallery design page to review details and references
description: Open a gallery design page to review details and references
narration: Open one design and the reference quality becomes tangible, not theoretical.
fallback_narration: Open one design and look at the reference details.

caption: Step 10: Tutorial complete - start learning TinkerCAD with no-login resources
description: Tutorial complete - start learning TinkerCAD with no-login resources
narration: Final beat. We went from a blank landing page to tutorials, examples, and creative starting points.
